description: Remove existing React codebase and create Flutter project scaffold with Clean Architecture, including pubspec.yaml, analysis_options.yaml, project configuration files, Android/iOS configs, and the complete directory structure under lib/
steps: Remove all existing React/JS files: src/, public/, package.json, package-lock.json, .eslintrc.js, .eslintignore, .npmrc, prettierrc.json, capacitor.config.json, node_modules/ (if exists). Keep: .git/, .github/, sql/, .env.example, README.md

Create pubspec.yaml with dependencies: flutter_riverpod, riverpod_annotation, go_router, dio, hive, hive_flutter, supabase_flutter, firebase_core, firebase_auth, freezed_annotation, json_annotation, google_fonts, flutter_animate, shimmer, cached_network_image, intl, uuid, fl_chart, image_picker. Dev dependencies: freezed, json_serializable, build_runner, riverpod_generator, hive_generator, flutter_lints
Create analysis_options.yaml with strict linting rules
Create lib/main.dart entry point with ProviderScope, Hive initialization, Supabase initialization, GoRouter setup

Create lib/core/theme/app_theme.dart with complete design system: colors (#E11D48 primary, #0F172A secondary, #22C55E success, #F59E0B warning, #3B82F6 info, #F8FAFC background), typography (Inter, Poppins), spacing (8,12,16,20,24,32), radius (12,16,20,24), shadows, card themes
Create lib/core/theme/app_colors.dart, lib/core/theme/app_typography.dart, lib/core/theme/app_spacing.dart
Create lib/core/constants/api_constants.dart with Supabase URL/key placeholders, Firebase config constants
Create lib/core/constants/app_constants.dart with app-wide constants
Create lib/core/network/dio_client.dart with Dio configuration, interceptors, error handling
Create lib/core/network/supabase_client.dart with Supabase initialization and helper methods
Create lib/core/storage/hive_storage.dart with Hive box management for local caching
Create lib/core/utils/date_utils.dart, lib/core/utils/validators.dart, lib/core/utils/extensions.dart
Create lib/core/router/app_router.dart with GoRouter configuration for all app routes

Create directory structure: lib/features/auth/, lib/features/home/, lib/features/matches/, lib/features/contests/, lib/features/fantasy/, lib/features/wallet/, lib/features/groups/, lib/features/profile/, lib/features/notifications/, lib/features/admin/
Create lib/shared/widgets/ and lib/shared/components/ directories with placeholder barrel files
Create android/app/build.gradle, android/build.gradle, android/settings.gradle with minimum SDK 21, target SDK 34
Create android/app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml with internet permission and app configuration
Create ios/Runner/Info.plist with basic iOS configuration
Create .env file template and lib/core/constants/env.dart for environment variable handling
Create a new README.md documenting the Flutter project setup, architecture, and how to run
acceptance_criteria: All React/JS files removed except .git/, .github/, sql/, .env.example
pubspec.yaml exists with all required dependencies listed
lib/main.dart exists with proper app initialization
Complete design system defined in lib/core/theme/
GoRouter configuration in lib/core/router/ with routes for all screens
Supabase client configured with real-time support
Hive storage configured for local caching
Android manifest and build.gradle configured properly
Directory structure matches the specified Clean Architecture layout
verification: Check that no .js, .jsx, .css files remain in lib/ or src/
Verify pubspec.yaml contains all required dependencies
Verify lib/main.dart has valid Dart syntax with ProviderScope wrapper
Verify lib/core/theme/app_theme.dart defines the complete color system
Verify lib/core/router/app_router.dart has routes for auth, home, matches, contests, fantasy, wallet, groups, profile, notifications, admin
